scripts.dev: concurrently --handle-input --default-input-target 1 -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.dev:clear: concurrently --handle-input --default-input-target 1 -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:clear"
scripts.dev:ios: concurrently -n backend,ios -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:ios"
scripts.dev:ios:clear: concurrently -n backend,ios -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:ios:clear"
scripts.dev:android: concurrently -n backend,android -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:android"
scripts.dev:android:clear: concurrently -n backend,android -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:android:clear"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:web"
scripts.dev:web:clear: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:web:clear"
